recommendations.title: Banana
recommendations.overview: The Minions fight over a delicious banana... but is that all they want?!

recommendations.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Action
recommendations.overview: A fanboy of a supervillain supergroup known as the Vicious 6, Gru hatches a plan to become evil enough to join them, with the backup of his followers, the Minions.

recommendations.title: Competition
recommendations.overview: Two minions working in a bomb lab get competitive.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me 3
recommendations.overview: Gru and his wife Lucy must stop former '80s child star Balthazar Bratt from achieving world domination.

recommendations.title: Minions
recommendations.overview: Minions Stuart, Kevin and Bob are recruited by Scarlet Overkill, a super-villain who, alongside her inventor husband Herb, hatches a plot to take over the world.

recommendations.title: Despicable Me
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Animation, Science Fiction, Crime

recommendations.title: Mower Minions
recommendations.overview: The Minions need to raise $20 to purchase an as seen on TV banana blender. So they take up lawn mowing at an old folks home, with hilarious antics!
